holdings.infoBox: HACK is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are Palo Alto Networks stock at 8.01%, CrowdStrike Holdings at 7.51%, Fortinet at 7.09%, Cisco Systems at 7.03%, and Broadcom at 6.53%.

overview.description: The Amplify Cybersecurity ETF (HACK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq ISE Cyber Security Select index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies around the globe that are actively involved in providing cybersecurity technology and services. HACK was launched on Nov 11, 2014 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
infoTable: Nasdaq ISE Cyber Security Select Index
